creator: cristianorolim@hotmail.com
text:
NagiosGrapher is a full-featured RRD based charting software especially for Nagios. You can extract perfdata and pluginoutput with preg to define datasources and display it with all RRD options. NG is Template based to graph thousands of similar charts with one configuration.

WWW: https://www.nagiosforge.org/gf/project/nagiosgrapher/


Attached, there is a shell archive of a port for nagiosgrapher.

Fix: Patch attached with submission follows:
